scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web,admin -c yellow,cyan,magenta "pnpm --dir api start:dev" "pnpm --dir web dev" "pnpm --dir admin dev"
scripts.build: pnpm --dir api build && pnpm --dir web build && pnpm --dir admin build
scripts.lint: pnpm --dir api lint && pnpm --dir web lint && pnpm --dir admin lint
